behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names the target file src/Functions/padString.cpp and all three argument names (string, length, pad_string) with exact old and new description strings.

no_solution_leakage.reason: instruction.md explicitly states the exact string replacements: 'Array' → 'String or FixedString', 'const UInt*' → 'UInt*', 'Array' → 'String', leaving no reasoning about what to change.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests use strict regex matching specific implementation details like static_cast<FunctionArgumentDescriptor::TypeValidator>(&isStringOrFixedString) and nullptr ordering, which would reject valid alternative formatting or refactoring.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Nearly all tests use TARGET_FILE.read_text() and regex/substring matches; the one compile attempt in test_padString_file_compiles falls back to text checks and doesn't actually verify runtime behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests verify specific string replacements tied to the bug fix; a stub cannot pass since the file's text must contain specific new descriptions and lack old ones.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All three description changes specified in instruction.md are tested via dedicated test functions.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are named descriptively (test_string_argument_has_correct_description, etc.) and grouped with a pass-to-pass section comment.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and identifiers are consistent between instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: instruction.md names the exact file src/Functions/padString.cpp and specifies the exact before/after strings, eliminating any localization task.
